name: Story Writer / Fantasy Bot Requests
description:
A story-writing bot. Because none of the ones I found fit my needs, surely people will get use out of this. If it needs anything changed, feel free to let me know.

I made this bot to make a god damn slowburn for my fantasy characters (All of which will be getting bots of their own soon)

But also Bot requests are open! If you like my bots, feel free to request a fantasy concept and I'll try my best to make one! Give this bot a try though, I'm hoping it goes well!
creator: StarshineSoda
